overall.description: First-person exploration of a dark, atmospheric corporate lobby in a video game (Cyberpunk 2077), featuring red neon accent lighting, sleek modern architecture, and the Arasaka corporation logo. The player character walks through corridors and open spaces, examining environmental details including a seating nook and corporate branding.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow, dark corporate corridor with red neon accent lighting. The camera moves forward toward glass exit doors, passing an illuminated decorative plant. The atmosphere is moody and atmospheric with cool green tones contrasting against the red neon.

scene_state.functional_zone: open-air corporate lobby with central illuminated monument

events.description: exiting enclosed corridor through glass doors into spacious open lobby
turning right toward side seating area while approaching monument

modern glass and steel building walls surrounding the lobby

segments.scene_description: Passing through the glass doors, the scene opens into a spacious corporate lobby with a tall illuminated monument at its center. The camera moves forward then turns right, revealing wall art and potted trees. The red neon lights from the corridor now appear distant on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: quiet seating nook with low table and bench

events.description: moving from open lobby into enclosed side seating area
slowing approach to examine low table with items

upholstered bench running along the right wall

segments.scene_description: The camera turns into a more enclosed seating nook featuring a low table with red carpet underneath and bench seating along the wall. The environment shifts from open lobby to intimate corner space with textured wall paneling and framed artwork.

scene_state.functional_zone: corporate branding wall with illuminated Arasaka logo

events.description: camera tilts upward to reveal illuminated Arasaka corporate logo on wall

agents.ego_description: examining magazines on table and looking up at illuminated corporate signage

entered.detail: illuminated gold corporate logo with Japanese text reading 'Arasaka'
stack of magazines or brochures on the low table

segments.scene_description: The camera focuses on the low table revealing magazines, then tilts up to display the illuminated gold Arasaka corporate logo on the textured wall. After observing the branding, the camera begins to turn back toward the entrance area.

scene_state.functional_zone: entrance stairs with red neon lighting

events.description: leaving seating area and returning toward main entrance with red lighting

agents.ego_description: turning back and walking toward entrance stairs with red neon accent lighting

entered.detail: short flight of stairs leading up to entrance area

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the return journey toward the entrance, with the camera passing the potted trees and approaching stairs illuminated by red neon lighting. The Arasaka logo and seating area fall behind as the explorer heads back toward the lobby exit.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a moody, narrow corridor into a spacious corporate lobby before retreating back toward the entrance. It begins by gliding through a dark hallway where cool green tones contrast with red neon accents, moving past a decorative plant toward glass exit doors. As the camera passes through these doors, the space expands into a vast lobby centered around a tall illuminated monument, shifting from the enclosed corridor to an open area filled with wall art and potted trees. The scene then turns into an intimate seating nook with red carpeting and textured paneling, where the camera focuses on magazines on a low table before tilting up to reveal a glowing gold Arasaka logo. Finally, the camera pivots away from the corporate branding and retreats through the lobby, passing the trees once more toward stairs bathed in red neon light.
